steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content: The preposition of is followed by three objects in a series: healing, self-discovery, and memory.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content: Objects of a preposition follow the preposition directly without intervening punctuation. Choice A correctly connects of directly to the objects. Choices B, C, and D insert punctuation (comma, em dash, colon) between the preposition and its objects. That matches choice A — A is correct.
